item9_obligations_summary.description: Item 9 is a cross-reference table mapping 26 obligation categories (a-z) to specific sections in LA, KTSLA, DSA, APA, MBOA, RA, and RAQ agreements, plus corresponding FDD items. Not a narrative item — purely a reference table.

yum_lending_assistance.lender: LS BDC Adviser, LLC (Lafayette Square Holding Company affiliate)
yum_lending_assistance.purpose: Acquisition, refinancing, related costs of franchised/licensed Unit
yum_lending_assistance.guarantee: YUM may guarantee up to 33% of original principal (max $5M guaranty)
yum_lending_assistance.default_consequences: YUM can buy out loan; License Agreement and MBOA may be terminated
yum_lending_assistance.no_fee_to_franchisor: Neither YUM nor franchisor receives fees from lender for loan origination

real_estate_subleases.cross_default: With License Agreement and other agreements

key_provisions: Non-exclusive license for single specified location
No right to prevent any use of Trademarks/System by anyone
Franchisor can open anywhere; KFC/PH/HBG can open anywhere
No options, ROFR, or similar rights for additional licenses
MBOA may be required when purchasing existing units
Channel restrictions: no pre-packaged food sales under Trademarks
Franchisor retains all pre-packaged product rights through all channels

item15_participation.residence_requirement: Within ~1 hour driving time of Unit

item16_restrictions.must_sell: All and only products in OneSource
item16_restrictions.franchisor_can_change: Unlimited right to change authorized goods/services

item18_public_figures.note: No public figure endorsements for license. Celebrity may appear in consumer advertising only. Licensee has no right to use public figure names.
